gloss.en: the time when it is your chance to act
gloss.zh: 轮到（某人做某事）的机会

words.example: When it's your turn, take another card.

gloss.en: television

words.example: We spent the evening watching TV.

gloss.en: the number 12

words.example: There are twelve months in a year.

gloss.en: the number 20

words.example: She is twenty years old.

gloss.en: the number 2

words.example: There are only two cookies left.

gloss.en: a folding object that keeps off rain or sun

words.example: Take an umbrella because it might rain.

gloss.en: the brother of your mother or father

words.example: My uncle lives in another city.

gloss.en: below something

words.example: The cat is under the table.

gloss.en: to draw a line under a word

words.example: Please underline the correct answer.

gloss.en: me and other people, as object

words.example: She gave us a picture as a wedding present.

gloss.en: most often; in the normal way

words.example: How long does the journey usually take?

gloss.en: time spent resting or travelling away from home

words.example: They're on vacation in Hawaii right now.

gloss.en: a container used for holding flowers

words.example: She put the flowers in a vase.

gloss.en: a plant or part of a plant eaten as food

words.example: The children don't eat enough fresh vegetables.

gloss.en: a recording of moving pictures and sound

words.example: We watched a funny video online.

gloss.en: a time when you go to see a place or person

words.example: We had a short visit to the museum.

gloss.en: a game where two teams hit a ball over a net

words.example: We play volleyball on the beach.

gloss.en: a man who serves food in a restaurant

words.example: I'll ask the waiter for the bill.

gloss.en: a woman who serves food in a restaurant

words.example: The waitress brought us some water.

gloss.en: to stop sleeping

words.example: I always wake early in the summer.

gloss.en: a journey on foot for pleasure or exercise

words.example: Let's go for a walk.

gloss.en: a solid vertical structure of stone or brick

words.example: They built a wall around the garden.

gloss.en: past tense of be for I/he/she/it

words.example: He was at home yesterday.

gloss.en: a small clock you wear on your wrist

words.example: She kept looking at her watch.

gloss.en: I and other people, as subject

words.example: We've moved to Atlanta.

gloss.en: to have clothes on your body

words.example: He was wearing a new suit.

gloss.en: how hot, cold, wet or sunny it is outside

words.example: The weather is cold and wet today.

gloss.en: the day after Tuesday

words.example: It's Wednesday today, isn't it?

gloss.en: a period of seven days

words.example: I will see you next week.

gloss.en: Saturday and Sunday

words.example: We are going away this weekend.

gloss.en: past tense of be for you/we/they

words.example: They were very happy yesterday.

gloss.en: used to ask for particular information

words.example: What is your name?

gloss.en: at what time

words.example: When did you last see him?

gloss.en: in or to what place

words.example: Where do you live?

gloss.en: used to ask about one from a limited set

words.example: Which color do you like?

gloss.en: having the colour of fresh snow or milk

words.example: He wore a crisp white shirt.

gloss.en: used to ask about a person's name or identity

words.example: Who is that woman?

gloss.en: used to ask the reason for something

words.example: Why were you late?

gloss.en: the woman a man is married to

words.example: I met my wife at university.

gloss.en: a glass-covered opening in a wall

words.example: She looked out of the window.

gloss.en: the coldest season of the year

words.example: It often snows in winter.

gloss.en: together with somebody or something

words.example: She lives with her parents.

gloss.en: an adult female person

words.example: The woman next door is very kind.

gloss.en: very good or pleasant

words.example: We had a wonderful time at the party.

gloss.en: a single unit of language with meaning

words.example: I don't know this English word.

gloss.en: the job a person does to earn money

words.example: He goes to work by bus.

gloss.en: a person who works, especially at a job

words.example: The factory has many workers.

gloss.en: the earth and all its countries and people

words.example: She wants to travel around the world.

gloss.en: used in polite offers and requests

words.example: Would you like a sandwich?

gloss.en: to make letters or words with a pen

words.example: Children learn to read and write at school.

gloss.en: a person whose job is writing books

words.example: Who's your favourite writer?

gloss.en: a period of twelve months

words.example: Elections take place every year.

gloss.en: having the colour of lemons or butter

words.example: She picked some pale yellow flowers.

gloss.en: used to say something is correct or true

words.example: Yes, it is my car.

gloss.en: on the day before today

words.example: I saw him yesterday.

gloss.en: a thick food made from milk

words.example: I ate some yoghourt for breakfast.

gloss.en: a thick food made from milk

words.example: She likes fruit yoghurt.

gloss.en: a thick food made from milk

words.example: He bought a cup of yogurt.

gloss.en: the person or people being spoken to

words.example: You said you knew the way.

gloss.en: belonging to the person being spoken to

words.example: I like your dress.

gloss.en: the same person being spoken to

words.example: Have you hurt yourself?

gloss.en: a place where wild animals are kept to see

words.example: We saw lions at the zoo.
